responsibilities: Design and develop ETL processes that extract, transform, and load data from diverse source systems
Build and maintain SSIS and Informatica workflows that support daily batch data integration jobs
Write and optimize complex SQL stored procedures and queries to support data transformation logic
Implement change data capture mechanisms to efficiently process incremental data updates from source systems
Monitor and troubleshoot ETL job failures, ensuring timely resolution to meet data delivery SLAs
Collaborate with business analysts and data architects to translate data mapping requirements into ETL logic
Optimize ETL job performance through query tuning, indexing strategies, and parallel processing techniques
Validate data accuracy and completeness across source and target systems through automated quality checks
Document ETL workflows, data mappings, and transformation rules to support maintainability and audits
Migrate legacy ETL processes to modern cloud-based data integration platforms and orchestration tools
